name: Tearlaments Cryme
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>壱世壊に澄み渡る残響</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ティアラメンツ・クライム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: Clear Echo in the First Broken World
desc: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated, while you control a "Tearlaments" monster or "Visas Starfrost": Negate the activation, and if you do, shuffle that card into the Deck, then send 1 monster from your hand to the GY. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 of your banished "Tearlaments" monsters; add it to your hand. You can only use 1 "Tearlaments Cryme" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated, while you control a "Tearlaments" monster or "Visas Starfrost": Negate the activation, and if you do, shuffle that card into the Deck, then send 1 monster from your hand to the GY. If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 of your banished "Tearlaments" monsters; add it to your hand. You can only use 1 "Tearlaments Cryme" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Adds banished cards to the hand
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
